_note: Only real Amazon products with real Amazon CDN images will be accepted. Placeholder ASINs (B0EXAMPLE*) and non-Amazon images are automatically skipped.
_howto_asin: Find ASIN in Amazon URL: amazon.com/dp/B0XXXXXXXXX (10 characters, starts with B0)
_howto_image: Right-click product image on Amazon -> Copy image address -> paste below (must start with https://m.media-amazon.com)
